title: stelis propagans
intro: Stelis propagans, also known as the False Chewing Stick, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues, as it is known to stimulate saliva production and improve digestion. The health benefits of Stelis propagans include relief from indigestion, nausea, and vomiting, as well as the potential to reduce inflammation and ease symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. In herbal preparations, Stelis propagans is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to alleviate digestive discomfort.
